optimizations.title: Checkout repeated 5x across jobs
optimizations.description: actions/checkout appears 5 times. Each checkout adds ~5-15s.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use a composite action or reusable workflow to share checkout + setup.

optimizations.title: Cache key uses exact SHA (low hit rate)
optimizations.description: Using github.sha as cache key means cache only hits on re-runs, not new commits.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use hashFiles for primary key, SHA for restore-keys fallback.

optimizations.title: 5 static sleep commands (103s total)
optimizations.description: Static sleeps waste time. Replace with health-check loops.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Replace 'sleep N' with: while ! pg_isready -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres; do sleep 2; done

optimizations.title: Actions use tag versions instead of SHA pins
optimizations.description: Tag-based versions (e.g., @v4) can be moved. SHA-pinning prevents supply chain attacks.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Pin critical actions to SHA: e.g., actions/checkout@<sha>

optimizations.title: Potential secret exposure in echo/log output
optimizations.description: Secrets used near echo commands could be accidentally logged.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use ::add-mask:: for dynamic secrets. Never echo ${{ secrets.* }}.
